plugins.name: dev-loop-core
plugins.description: Portable Claude Code skills: a multi-model (codex + deepseek + agy) review gate, and a daily session-retro that mines your transcripts for friction and writes evidence-backed improvement recommendations. No repo assumptions.

plugins.name: gated-land
plugins.description: An opinionated, autonomous gate-and-land pipeline for solo devs: one-shot ship gate, a capped verify->fix->re-gate loop, and a serialized local merge queue with a config-driven risk classifier. Builds on dev-loop-core's review gate. Configure it to your repo via dev-loop.conf.
